title: Medical Documentation and Secretariat Program Educational Objectives
content:
Medical Documentation and Secretariat Program Educational Objectives

1. To learn and effectively use basic medical terminology in the healthcare field.

2. To prepare medical documents accurately, completely, and in accordance with standards.

3. To use patient registration and information management systems efficiently.

4. To conduct communication, archiving, and filing procedures professionally in healthcare institutions.

5. To act in accordance with medical ethics and patient confidentiality principles.

6. To use office programs and technological tools effectively in the field of medical secretarial services.

7. To be knowledgeable about healthcare legislation and apply it appropriately.

8. To possess a team-oriented, disciplined, and responsible work ethic.

9. To establish effective communication with patients and healthcare staff.

10. To be open to professional development and lifelong learning.
